texto: I really, really, really want to do a silly romantic comedy where I can just have a crush on the guy, trip over myself, and laugh and be goofy. I just feel like all I do is cry, sob, and fight zombies and the bad guys.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Laurie Holden: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “I really, really, really want to do a silly romantic comedy where I can just have a crush on the …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, myself, fight pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de fight e laugh.
